answer:
The draft is for $562.50, discounted at 6% for the time from April 15 to the maturity date (60 days from April 10, so due June 9). The discount period is 55 days (April 15 to June 9), and the bank discount is $562.50 × 0.06 × (55/360) ≈ $5.16. Subtracting gives proceeds of $562.50 − $5.16 = $557.34.  

\boxed{B}
